properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Bind us together Lord, bind us together, Bind us together with cords that cannot be broken, Bind us together Lord, bind us together, Bind us together with love.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is only one God, there is only one King, There is only one Body, that’s why I sing.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Made for the glory of God, purchased by His precious Son, Born with the right to be clean, for Jesus the victory has won.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are the family of God, you are the promise divine, You are God’s chosen desire, you are the glorious new wine.
